nasb.text: The scribe said to Him, “Right, Teacher; You have truly stated that He is One, and there is no one else besides Him;

esv.text: And the scribe said to him, “You are right, Teacher. You have truly said that he is one, and there is no other besides him.

cnv.text: 那經學家對耶穌說：“老師，是的，你說的很對，　神是獨一的，除了他以外再沒有別的　神。

ccb.text: 那位律法教师说：“老师，你说的对，上帝只有一位，除祂以外，别无他神。

csbs.text: 那经文士就对耶稣说：“不错，老师，你真的讲了：神只有一位，除他以外没有别的神。
